items.title: Mexico's president responds after Trump says country owes Texas water
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Mexico will make an immediate water delivery to Texas farmers in an effort to address its shortfall under a decades-old water treaty that has drawn tariff threats from Donald Trump, Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum announced Friday. Read more: https://bit.ly/3RRsqfP 

#mexico #news #texas 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Melanie Fiona shares if she feels pressure to chase the success of ‘It Kills Me’
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Melanie Fiona isn’t chasing another “It Kills Me.” The Grammy-nominated artist just dropped her first EP in 13 years, “Say Yes,” and says she’s focused on creating something brand new.
#melaniefiona #rnbmusic #shorts</article>

items.title: Can one of Africa’s largest refugee camps evolve into a city?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>One of Africa’s most famous refugee camps could transform into a city. The Kakuma camp in a remote part of Kenya houses 300,000 refugees. Many rely on aid to survive, and some of them recently protested against shrinking rations. Now Kenya'a government has re-designated Kakuma as a municipality. It's part of broader goal of incorporating refugees more closely into local populations.Read more: https://bit.ly/3G3Rv4N 

#kenya #africa 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Officials give update on helicopter that plunged into the Hudson River
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>The National Transportation Safety Board is investigating the crash of a helicopter that broke apart midair and plunged into the Hudson River between New York City and New Jersey Thursday, killing all 6 people aboard. #shorts</article>

items.title: OK Go criticizes social media's focus on quantity over quality
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>OK Go's Damian Kulash critiques social media's quantity over quality mindset as the band releases "And the Adjacent Possible," their first LP since 2014.
#okgo #damiankulash #shorts</article>

items.title: LIVE: Scene in Athens after bomb explosion in Greece
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from Athens after a bomb planted near the offices of Hellenic Train, Greece’s main railway company, exploded Friday night, authorities said. There were no immediate reports of injuries.

The explosion comes amid widespread public anger over a 2023 railway disaster in which 57 people were killed and dozens more injured when a freight train and a passenger train heading in opposite directions were accidentally put on the same track. Read more: https://bit.ly/3Emn09F 

#athens #greece #live</article>

items.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine captured first Chinese citizens 'fighting for Russia'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy on Friday addressed members of the Ramstein meeting in Brussels via video link, urging for strengthening of air defense for Ukraine. He also said Ukrainian soldiers had "captured the first Chinese citizens fighting on the front."

#zelenskyy #ukraine #russia #china

items.content:

items.title: LIVE: NTSB holds press conference a day after helicopter crash kills 6 in New York
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as the National Transportation Safety Board holds a press conference after a New York City sightseeing helicopter crashed into the Hudson River, killing the pilot and a family of five visiting from Spain, officials said.

#newyork #hudsonriver #live</article>

items.title: Katy Perry on studying Carl Sagan and string theory ahead of spaceflight | AP interview
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Before she kicks off her upcoming world tour, Katy Perry is reaching for the stars. The pop icon will join Lauren Sanchez, Gayle King and three other women on an all-female spaceflight Monday. Perry sat down with AP entertainment journalist Krysta Fauria to talk about yearning to fly, studying Carl Sagan and string theory and inspiring young women with the crew's 10-minute spaceflight from West Texas. #katyperry #blueorigin</article>

items.title: Video captures aftermath of a plane crash near a major highway in Florida
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Three people were killed and one was injured when a small plane crashed Friday morning in South Florida near a major highway and pushed a car onto railroad tracks, officials said.

#shorts #florida #planecrash #aftermath</article>

items.title: Supreme Court says Trump administration must 'facilitate' return of mistakenly deported man
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The Supreme Court says the Trump administration must work to bring back a Maryland man, Kilmar Abrego Garcia, who was mistakenly deported to El Salvador, rejecting the administration’s emergency appeal. (AP Video: Nathan Ellgren). Read more: https://bit.ly/42AXMN4 

#trump #elsalvador
